premise: My sister convinced our dying mother to sign her entire $435,000 estate into a secret trust just for her, and then told me I was cut off for being 'greedy.' Five years later she needed a bone marrow donor for her daughter and I was the only match — I donated only after she publicly confessed and wired me every cent.

thumb.label: Thumbnail + metadata
thumb.detail: My Sister Stole $435K From Our Dying Mom And Cut Me Off. So I Refused To Help He
